title: Landmark Closes $2.1B Acquisition of Premium European Office Portfolio
excerpt: Landmark Property Advisors completes acquisition of 34 office properties across London, Frankfurt, and Paris for €1.9B, expanding European footprint to 127 properties.
content: In a landmark transaction, Landmark Property Advisors has successfully acquired a premium European office portfolio comprising 34 Class-A office buildings across three major European capitals. The investment represents Landmark's largest European acquisition to date and positions the firm as a leading office portfolio owner in Western Europe.

title: Landmark Reports Record Q1 2026 Performance: $1.7B Capital Deployment
excerpt: Q1 2026 represents strongest capital deployment quarter in firm history, with $1.7B invested across 47 acquisitions and 12 major property renovations.
content: Landmark Property Advisors announced record first-quarter performance with $1.7B in capital deployment across its investment platforms. The quarter marked exceptional growth driven by strong acquisition activity, successful value-add completions, and robust capital raising across all fund vehicles.

title: Landmark Launches $3.5B Sustainability-Focused Real Estate Fund
excerpt: New Landmark Green Properties Fund targets LEED Platinum and carbon-neutral real estate investments, committing $500M capital to environmental initiatives.
content: Landmark Property Advisors announced the launch of Landmark Green Properties Fund, a dedicated $3.5B real estate platform focused on sustainable and environmentally responsible properties. The fund prioritizes properties with LEED Platinum certifications and measurable carbon reduction targets.

title: Landmark Expands Asia-Pacific Operations with New Singapore Hub
excerpt: Strategic expansion establishes Landmark's 11th regional office and 8th Asia-Pacific location, covering $4.2B in regional property holdings.
content: Landmark Property Advisors has announced the establishment of a new regional headquarters in Singapore to consolidate and expand its Asia-Pacific operations. The new hub will serve as the operational center for Landmark's rapidly growing $4.2B in Asia-Pacific real estate holdings.

title: Landmark CEO Robert Heitman Named 'Real Estate Leader of the Year'
excerpt: Industry recognition honors Heitman's 35-year career transforming global real estate markets and pioneering sustainable property investment strategies.
content: Robert Heitman, Founder and CEO of Landmark Property Advisors, has been named 'Real Estate Leader of the Year' by the Global Real Estate Investment Council. The honor recognizes Heitman's visionary leadership and transformative impact on the commercial real estate sector.

title: Landmark Announces Strategic Partnership with European Infrastructure Fund
excerpt: Co-investment partnership commits €750M to joint real estate development projects across continental Europe, combining complementary expertise and capital.
content: Landmark Property Advisors and European Infrastructure Partners announced a strategic co-investment partnership focused on major real estate development and repositioning projects across Europe. The partnership combines complementary capabilities in real estate development and infrastructure investment.
